lore.english:
A Taimanin who mainly participates in front-line combat. She often zones out, which is why she doesn't really stand out in combat training. But she is surprisingly persistent in actual combat.

She is usually seen alone most of the time, but it doesn't mean she dislikes others. Rather, she has a strong bond with her teammates, and does not tolerate anyone who injures them. She is very frugal and is not interested in anything but spending time with wild birds she feeds.

Possesses the Eclipse Meld, which is a ninja art that absorbs powers from every exchange of blows during combat against an enemy. The longer the battle, the more powerful it becomes, but it takes some time to fully kick in.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Monk Staff Art[-]
skills.description:
Stabs the enemy with a stone scepter, attacking 4 times.
Restores [&HP] of the ally with the lowest [&HP] on the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], by [&Color_Cyan][V3:410102]%[-].
skills.description_readable:
Stabs the enemy with a stone scepter, attacking 4 times.
Restores [&HP] of the ally with the lowest [&HP] on the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], by [V3:410102]%.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Eclipse Meld: Syphoning Strike[-]
skills.description:
Uses Ninja Art to attack [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the target hit by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:410202]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:410202]%[-] chance.
When attacking, if [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]50%[-] or more, fills the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:410203]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:410203]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Uses Ninja Art to attack [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
Reduces the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the target hit by ([V3:410202]%) at a [R:410202]% chance.
When attacking, if [&HP] is 50% or more, fills the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by ([V3:410203]%) at a [R:410203]% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Eclipse Meld: Sound[-]
skills.description:
Unleashes a Ninja Art that heals all allies, restoring [&Color_Cyan][V3:410301]%[-] of Max. [&HP].
Increases the turns of [V3:410302] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] the character has by [V2:410302] turn(s).
skills.description_readable:
Unleashes a Ninja Art that heals all allies, restoring [V3:410301]% of Max. [&HP].
Increases the turns of [V3:410302] [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] the character has by [V2:410302] turn(s).

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Eclipse Meld: Resonate[-]
skills.description:
Using a skill on every 5th turn grants an additional effect.
When using [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_4101], [&HealRate] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:410401]%)[-].
When using [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_4102], inflicts [&Restraint] on the enemy.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:410402] turn(s)
When using [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_4103], grants a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:410403]%)[-] [&HealTurn] to all allies for [V2:410402] turn(s).
